title: celtis leveillei
intro: Celtis leveillei, also known as the Ironwood tree or Chinese ironwood, is a plant species native to China, with its bark being used in traditional medicine. The bark of the Celtis leveillei plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Celtis leveillei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Celtis leveillei is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
